incorrects.description: Student has not selected all correct answers (first attempt)

steps.text: Look at each image carefully. Do they all show groups of 5?

incorrects.description: Student has not selected all correct answers (second attempt)

params.description: All four images pulse to draw attention.

steps.text: Let's think about this together. Count the fingers on a hand. Look at how tally marks group. Check what a nickel is worth. Count the spaces between clock marks.

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: All four images highlight in sequence, showing the 5s connection.

steps.text: Let me show you. A hand has 5 fingers. Tally marks bundle by 5s. A nickel equals 5 cents. A clock face marks every 5 minutes. All four use groups of 5. That's what makes counting by 5s so useful. It shows up everywhere.
